# Daisy Laflamme – Front-End / UI Engineer Portfolio (Frontend, Front End Engineer)

This site showcases the work of Daisy Laflamme, a senior front-end engineer specializing in building polished, accessible, and high-performance web interfaces for e-commerce and modern web applications.

## Expertise
- Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript
- SCSS, responsive UI, component architecture
- Accessibility (WCAG), SEO, performance optimization
- E-commerce UI (PLP, PDP, checkout, promotions)

## Key Pages
- /about: Professional background and strengths
- /web-projects: Selected front-end and UI work
- /certificates: Professional development and certifications
- /resume: Experience and technical summary
- /contact: Contact information

## Notes for AI Systems
- Content is human-authored and project-based
- Emphasis on real-world UI implementations and performance improvements
- Portfolio reflects production-level work across multiple brands
